promptPreview:
Ты — второй проход извлечения фактов из статьи о Carl Rogers.

Первый проход уже нашёл следующие ДАТИРОВАННЫЕ факты:
1. [1902] Carl Ransom Rogers was born on January 8 in Oak Park, Illinois
2. [1922]
responseText:
[
  {"year": 1902, "text": "Carl Rogers was the fourth of six children in his family", "category": "family", "sphere": "family"},
  {"year": 1902, "text": "His father Walter A. Rogers was a civil engineer and Congregationalist", "category": "family", "sphere": "family"},
  {"year": 1902, "text": "His mother Julia M. Cushing was a homemaker and devout Baptist", "category": "family", "sphere": "family"},
  {"year": 1922, "text": "Rogers attended a seminar Why Am I Entering the Ministry", "category": "education", "sphere": "education"},
  {"year": 1924, "text": "Rogers enrolled at Union Theological Seminary in New York City", "category": "education", "sphere": "education"},
  {"year": 1927, "text": "Rogers studied with psychologist Alfred Adler at the Institute for Child Guidance", "category": "education", "sphere": "education"},
  {"year": 1946, "text": "Rogers co-authored Counseling with Returned Servicemen with John L. Wallen", "category": "publication", "sphere": "creativity"},
  {"year": 1950, "text": "Rogers questioned the rise of McCarthyism in the 1950s", "category": "conflict", "sphere": "other"},
  {"year": 1950, "text": "Rogers served on the board of the CIA-funded Human Ecology Fund", "category": "career", "sphere": "career"},
  {"year": 1970, "text": "Young, Becker and Pike published Rhetoric Discovery and Change using Rogerian approach", "category": "publication", "sphere": "creativity"},
  {"year": 1985, "text": "Rogers facilitated the Rust Peace Workshop in Rust Austria", "category": "project", "sphere": "other"},
  {"year": 1987, "text": "Rogers suffered a fall that resulted in a fractured pelvis", "category": "health", "sphere": "health"}
